steps.observed: Procedure list with empty state message '0 de 0 trámites activos' displayed

steps.action: Create a new procedure via modal
steps.observed: Procedure 'Renovación de Licencia' with 'Activo' badge and slug 'renovacion-de-licencia' appears in list

evidence.network: Admin login and procedure list API calls

assertions.title: Procedure detail panel shows on selection

steps.action: Click on procedure card 'Renovación de Licencia'
steps.expected: Detail panel opens with full config
steps.observed: Detail panel shows with tabs (General, Formulario, Documentos), active switch, description, version v1, form schema, and document schema
Modal opens with fields: name (textbox), slug (textbox), description (textarea), active switch, Cancel and Create buttons

steps.action: Fill name 'Renovación de Licencia' and description
steps.observed: Name and description filled, Create button enabled

steps.expected: Procedure created and appears in list
steps.observed: Procedure created successfully, toast notification shown, detail panel opens for new procedure

steps.action: Click 'Trámite activo' switch while procedure is active
steps.observed: Switch changed from [checked] to unchecked, procedure badge changed from 'Activo' to 'Inactivo'

assertions.title: Duplicate procedure functionality

steps.observed: No 'Duplicar' button or duplicate action found in procedure list or detail panel

steps.action: Search page text for 'duplicar' or similar
steps.observed: No duplicate-related text found on page

assertions.issues: The duplicate procedure functionality is NOT implemented in the UI. There is no 'Duplicar' button or action available for procedures.

summary: Tested 5 assertions for Trámites (Procedures) area: 4 passed (VAL-TRAMITES-001, 002, 003, 004), 1 failed (VAL-TRAMITES-005: duplicate functionality not implemented). No console errors detected. Empty state displays correctly. Create modal works as expected. Toggle active state works correctly. Duplicate functionality is missing from the UI.
